title: DeleteDB Statement
parameters:
databaseNum	Specify the database number (integer from 501 to 508) specified in OpenDB.

tableNumber	Specify the table name whose data will be deleted.

If the database type specified by fileNumber is Excel book, specify the Excel sheet or the table with the name.

When specifying the Excel sheet, put $ at the end of the sheet name and put the name in brackets ( [ ] ).

When specifying the field using the name in the Excel sheet, put the name in brackets ( [ ] ).

condition	Specify the condition to delete the data.

Compound condition can be specified by using AND and  OR.

If the condition is not specified, all data in the table will be deleted.
description:
Deletes the data macted to the delete condition from the specified table in the opened database.

If the database is an Excel book, write a column name used for data deletion in the first line of the field defined by the sheet or the name.

Note

Connection of PC with installed RC+ is required.
